name: Perimeter Solutions, SA
description: Perimeter Solutions is a premier global provider of high-quality firefighting products and specialty lubricant additives. Headquartered in St. Louis, Missouri, the company specializes in developing critical solutions for fire safety, including long-term fire retardants and advanced foam concentrates used to combat wildland, structural, and industrial fires. Additionally, its Specialty Products segment produces phosphorus pentasulfide-based lubricant additives and electronic components. Committed to performance and reliability, Perimeter Solutions delivers 'Solutions That Save,' supporting government agencies and commercial customers worldwide with superior technology and a robust service network designed for high-stakes, emergency-response environments.
